title: Count P1 incidents by assignment group
question: Write a background script to count active P1 incidents by assignment group.
summary: Uses GlideAggregate so the analyst can see where the current P1 queue is concentrated.
exactAnswer: Use GlideAggregate on incident, filter to active Priority 1 records, group by assignment_group, and print the count.
steps: Run it and review the grouped output.
commonMistakes: Using GlideRecord when the requirement is grouped counts.
explanation: GlideAggregate is the correct API when the requirement is count by group.

title: Script Include to calculate priority from impact and urgency
question: Write a reusable function that calculates priority from impact and urgency values.
summary: A clean interview example of moving decision logic into a Script Include instead of duplicating it.
exactAnswer: Create a Script Include that accepts impact and urgency and returns the correct priority value so multiple automations can share the same logic.
steps: Paste the script and save it.

title: Find duplicate CI names by class
question: Write a background script to identify repeated CI names within the same class.
summary: A fast duplicate-screening technique useful before full CMDB cleanup.
exactAnswer: Use GlideAggregate on cmdb_ci, group by name and sys_class_name, and only print rows where the count is greater than 1.
steps: Run it and review duplicate candidates.

title: Query child CIs for a parent service
question: Write a background script to list all child CIs related to a given business service.
summary: Uses cmdb_rel_ci to walk CI relationships and print child records.
exactAnswer: Use cmdb_rel_ci, filter by parent CI sys_id, then print child display value and relationship type.

title: Count discovered CIs by discovery source
question: Write a background script to count CIs by discovery_source.
summary: Shows how to profile discovery inputs and source spread.
exactAnswer: Use GlideAggregate on cmdb_ci, group by discovery_source, and print the count for each source.
steps: Run it and review the grouped counts.

title: Query MID Server records and status
question: Write a background script to print MID Server names and status.
summary: Useful for discovery triage and infrastructure readiness checks.
exactAnswer: Query ecc_agent and print MID Server names with status values so discovery troubleshooting starts with platform health.
steps: Run it and review the MID list.

title: Script Include to calculate a qualitative risk rating
question: Write a Script Include that converts impact and likelihood into a qualitative risk rating.
summary: Reusable example for GRC scenarios where teams want consistent scoring language.
exactAnswer: Create a reusable function that multiplies impact and likelihood, then maps the score to Low, Moderate, High, or Critical.
steps: Paste the script and save it.

title: Queue reminder events for pending control attestations
question: Write a script snippet that queues a reminder event for attestations due in two days.
summary: Good example of using events instead of embedding notification logic in many places.
exactAnswer: Find qualifying tasks or attestation records approaching due date and queue an event so reminder notifications stay configurable.
steps: Use a scheduled job or flow.
Queue an event for each qualifying record.

title: Script Include to derive vulnerability priority
question: Write a Script Include that converts exploitability and asset criticality into a response priority.
summary: A practical SecOps pattern for consistent prioritization logic.
exactAnswer: Create a utility that takes exploitability and asset criticality, calculates a simple score, and returns a priority bucket.
steps: Paste the script and save it.

title: Count open vulnerable items by assignment group
question: Write a script to count open vulnerable items grouped by assignment group.
summary: Useful for vulnerability response queue analysis.
exactAnswer: Use GlideAggregate on the vulnerable item table, filter out closed states, and group by assignment_group.
steps: Run it and review the grouped counts.

title: Query unassigned hardware assets
question: Write a background script to list in-use hardware assets that are not assigned to a user.
summary: Useful for HAM cleanup and accountability reviews.
exactAnswer: Query alm_hardware for assets that are in use but have no assigned_to value, then print the asset tag and model.
steps: Run it and review the list.

title: Count hardware assets by stockroom
question: Write a GlideAggregate script to count hardware assets by stockroom.
exactAnswer: Use GlideAggregate on alm_hardware, group by stockroom, and print the counts.
steps: Run it and review the grouped counts.

title: Create a function to identify reclamation candidates
question: Write a Script Include function that returns true when software usage is inactive beyond a threshold.
summary: Keeps reclamation logic reusable and easy to tune.
exactAnswer: Create a reusable function that compares days since last use to a threshold and returns whether the record is a reclamation candidate.
steps: Paste the script and save it.

title: Normalize publisher name with a map
question: Write a simple function that normalizes common publisher-name variations into a single standard value.
summary: Useful interview example for SAM data preparation.
exactAnswer: Use a lookup map so known vendor aliases resolve to one standard publisher name before reporting or reconciliation logic runs.
steps: Paste the script and save it.
